content.problemStatement:
Chef is solving mathematics problems. He is preparing for Engineering Entrance exam. He's stuck in a problem.

f(n)=1n∗2n−1∗3n−2∗…∗n1f(n)=1^n*2^{n-1}*3^{n-2} * \ldots * n^{1} f(n)=1n∗2n−1∗3n−2∗…∗n1

Help Chef to find the value of f(n)f(n)f(n).Since this number could be very large, compute it modulo 100000000710000000071000000007.

###Input:


First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line of input,  NNN.
###Output:
For each testcase, output in a single line the value of f(n)f(n)f(n) mod 100000000710000000071000000007.

###Constraints


1≤T≤1061 \leq T \leq 10^61≤T≤106
1≤N≤1061 \leq N \leq 10^61≤N≤106
###Subtasks
Subtask 1(24 points) :


1≤T≤50001 \leq T \leq 50001≤T≤5000
1≤N≤50001 \leq N \leq 50001≤N≤5000
Subtask 2(51 points) : original constraints
